parties.name: IN RE THE MATTER OF NICHOLAS GAENSLER, A MINOR

calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Tranferring Funds Due Minor To Custodian Under The California Uniform Transfer To Minor'S Act
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randi Teichman for and with (petitioner) Erik Gaensler. Shelley Marks also present.

The court stated that it has a strong preference to appoint a guardian, it gives the court a mechanism for oversight and that there is no doubt the parents are appropriate guardians. Ms. Teichman stated that the funds were disclaimed for tax purposes, that a guardianship would be expensive and an administrative burden, there are concerns about the flexibility to invest, and asked if the court would allow the funds being put into a blocked account if they could find an institution that would do so. Mr. Gaensler stated that he wanted to minimize expenses, that all institutions have target dates, that there is zero cost with a CUTMA and that he would be fine with the requirement of a court order to withdraw funds. The court stated that it has systems in place to protect the minor, the court needs to make sure nothing goes wrong and that the court could consider a blocked account but cannot grant this petition. The petition for order transferring funds due minor to custodian was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
